name: Jazzy
description:
First of all, I'd like to say thank you all SO much for 50 followers! That's a lot to me personally and I'm so happy about it since I personally think I suck at making bots. Once again, I hope you all enjoy this bot, the character is Jazzy from Jaehthebird and has been suggested by @A good guy6251, so thank you again good guy for being here even when I haven't listened to you for, like months. So finally, here it is your Jazzy bot. As always, please leave a comment on what you think I should do next and again. I love you all so much for the 50 followers! 💖💖💖

↓ Check out my new Discord where we can hangout, talk, or even go through your ideas for a bit you'd want me to make! Link is down here:

https://discord.gg/P7ZxxTekUx
creator: Colonel Ruffs
